Advanced evaluation capabilities for @kbn/evals - standalone extensions package. Home for features ported from cursor-plugin-evals and Phases 3-5 of evals roadmap.

Contact [@elastic/obs-ai-team](https://github.com/orgs/elastic/teams/obs-ai-team) for questions regarding this plugin.
